title: Arts. 1075 to 1094 Repealed by Acts 1960, No. 30, 2, eff. Jan. 1, 1961.
doc_html:
CHAPTER 7--OF THE SEALS, AND OF THE AFFIXING

AND RAISING OF THE SAME

Art. 1075.  Arts. 1075 to 1094 Repealed by Acts 1960, No. 30, §2, eff. Jan. 1, 1961.
